description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure, likely a saint or religious figure, holding a cross in one hand and a book or object in the other. The figure is adorned with a circular halo above the head, suggesting a Christian iconography. The robe is detailed with folds and drapes, and the figure stands on a rectangular plinth. The back of the sculpture shows a rounded object, possibly a hat or additional garment, attached to the figure. The surface appears weathered, with visible signs of aging and discoloration, indicating it may have been exposed to the elements. The overall form is solid and monolithic, with intricate details in the facial features and hands.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a robed religious figure with a halo, holding a cross and standing on a plinth. The surface is aged and detailed, with visible folds in the robe and a rounded object on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, cross, and detailed robe folds, with the halo clearly visible above the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the outstretched arm, the thickness of the robe, and the profile of the halo and head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded object on the back, the back of the robe, and the full circular halo.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, the cross held close to the chest, and the draping of the robe.
attribute_subject_matter: human religious figure with halo and cross
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
